text: Gazing through the dimly lit glass doors, I sense a hesitation—a moment of anticipation and slight uncertainty. Crossing the threshold into the world of research and development, as the bold letters "R + D" greet me inside, I feel curiosity awakening. The space hums with possibility; knowledge and innovation hang thick in the air. I feel small, yet invigorated, standing at the precipice of unknown ideas and human ingenuity. Here, I am both a humble inquirer and a participant in the unfolding story of discovery.
